chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-585 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 18.12.2025 Mr. Sajjad Ahmed Chandio, advocate for petitioner Mr. Kamaluddin, advocate for respondent University a/w Legal Officer Arbab Ali Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri, Assistant A.G Sindh *** Through this petition, the petitioner had sought directions against the respondent University to allow him to appear in Final Semester Examination of First Semester and this Court vide Order dated 20.03.2024 allowed the petitioner to participate in examination. Today learned counsel representing the respondent University submits that petitioner participated in examination, however, he has failed in the result. Since the petitioner participated in the examination, the purpose of this petition stood served, therefore, this petition stands disposed of being infructuous; however, the petitioner is at liberty to avail remedy to supplementary, if the law permits. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
